findings.message: New data-store write path (delete_items_by_prefix) with no metric or span instrumentation. The function performs a database delete operation without observability instrumentation, making this data-layer operation invisible to monitoring and tracing.
findings.suggestion: Add metric recording and/or span instrumentation around the database write operation. Consider recording the number of deleted rows and request latency metrics, similar to patterns used elsewhere in the observability infrastructure (MetricsRegistry.record_request).
